titles.title: He is Able More than Able

authors.author: Greg Ferguson
Greg Ferguson
Er ist mächtig, Gott ist mächtig

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is able, more than able to accomplish what concerns me today. He is able, more than able to handle anything that comes my way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is able, more than able to do much more than I could ever dream, He is able, more than able, to make me what He wants me to be.
